about.label: About Me
about.title: Code that scales. Teams that ship.
about.role: Senior Software Engineer · AI-Driven Builder · Tech Lead
about.bio1: With 15+ years of experience, I design, build, and scale high-quality web applications and engineering systems — operating across the full development lifecycle from architecture to hands-on coding. I've taken on roles such as Tech Lead, Project Manager, and Software Architect, always focused on delivering robust, maintainable solutions aligned with real business impact.
about.bio2: Pragmatic, product-oriented, and impact-driven. I specialize in AI-augmented engineering workflows, integrating LLMs into real products, and leading cross-functional teams toward clear, high-impact goals.

career.title: Engineering Career
career.content: 15+ years across startups, agencies, and enterprise — always at the intersection of software development and technical leadership. Worldwide scope, cross-cultural teams, high-impact products.

ai.title: AI Expertise
ai.content: Applied AI practitioner — not theoretical. Daily use of Claude, GPT, Cursor, and Copilot. Building AI-assisted workflows: code generation, automation pipelines, scraping, and LLM integration into real products.

items: Agile · Scrum · Kanban

CI/CD & TDD
System design & scalability

education.title: Education
education.content: BSc Systems Engineering · Universidad Nacional de Rosario. Certified Scrum Master, Scrum Alliance. Continuous learner — conferences, courses, and hands-on experimentation.

global.title: Global Experience
items: English · full professional
Spanish · native
NZ, USA, ARG — cross-cultural teams
Remote-first for 7+ years
Amazon · Ring · Flowspace
Developed and maintained warehouse operations software — inventory management, order fulfillment, and automation.
Designed integrations with third-party logistics providers (3PLs) for seamless shipping workflows.
Translated operational requirements into scalable software solutions alongside warehouse teams.
Contributed to backend and frontend services connecting users and public safety agencies.
Maintained community programs and public safety platforms (Ring ecosystem).
Operated across AWS: Lambda, EC2, RDS, CDK, EventBridge, SQS, SNS, CloudFormation.
Lead engineer for Neighbors — hyper-local video sharing for crime & safety, powered by PostGIS geolocation.
Built microservices connecting IoT devices to client apps: Ruby, Go, Node.js, React.
Built Retail Explorers backend (Rails) and React admin tools for location-based iOS/Android field surveys.
Progression: Retail Backend Lead → Neighbors Web Team → Senior Software Engineer.
Led web and mobile development for federal agencies, Fortune 1000 companies, and startups.
Architected a multipurpose employee portal and dashboard with microservices architecture.
Key projects: RGS Energy Solar365, The Bozzuto Group, Gallup.
Led 10-person cross-cultural team across frontend, backend, and QA.
Full-stack PHP on Magento Enterprise Edition.
Managed teams for G2 Webservices, Kinnser, WebAssign, and iContact — CI, TDD, automation.
Led development for Sungevity (CA): SugarCRM 5.5, CakePHP portal, load-balanced architecture.
Configuration testing and implementation for multinational clients. Supervised junior developers.
Projects in C, PHP, Python, Perl, C#: stock management, CCTV, traffic visualizer, distributed POS.
Part-time while at university. AS/400, Cool Plex. Roles: Dev, QA, Analyst.
